# PlaygroundLiveViewRepresentation.view(_:)

**Enumeration Case**

A UIKit view that's displayed as the live view.

## Declaration

```swift
case view(UIView)
```

## Displaying UIKit Views

- **PlaygroundLiveViewRepresentation.viewController(_:)**: A UIKit view controller whose view is displayed as the live view.
